violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use the dishwasher for washing ONLY. All equipment must be sanitized at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer was changed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back near the walk-in cooler, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
